notes: SHIP v1.14.259 — INSPECT-3D FOG (one-line fidelity fix, John-directed 2026-07-15). The mock (MOCKUP-INSPECT3D-FINAL.html L327) declares `scene.fog = new THREE.FogExp2(0x030508, 0.008)` in its scene setup; the .255 bay port explicitly DROPPED it (the scene comment read 'no solid bg / no fog — the env cubemap + backdrop carry depth' — that was the mistake). John's parameter audit shows everything else in parity, so the missing fog is why .258 read WASHED OUT where the mock reads DEEP-BLACK. TWO edits, dct-ios.html only, both in rackElevation_render3D: (1) add `scene.fog = new THREE.FogExp2(0x030508, 0.008)` immediately after `var scene = new THREE.Scene()` (scene comment corrected to 'no solid bg'); (2) `scene.fog = null` in bayDispose alongside the env-map teardown (FogExp2 has no dispose() — null is the correct cleanup; folded in per John's dispose note). No other changes. Gates: node --check 4 inline blocks + sw.js PASS; fog set exactly once + cleared in teardown (grep-verified); CRLF preserved (bare-LF 0); NO CSS touched (brace balance unchanged); three-stamp lockstep .258->.259. ?legacy=1 BYTE-IDENTICAL: the edit is inside rackElevation_render3D, reachable only via the body.rd 3D toggle; the legacy house never enters it. Applies ONLY to the reh3d bay scene (:31801) — the sibling forge3d scene (:17777) is untouched. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, iPhone): 3D rack now reads DEEP-BLACK / atmospheric like the mock (not washed out); depth falls off with distance; rack still reads as the star; scan wave / bezel strips / bay unchanged; FLAT->GL disposed clean + FORGE after -> no crash (fog nulled in teardown). BATCH: stacks on the 3D-rack line (.251-.257 fidelity + this) — consolidated device pass still owed; this is a single-parameter fidelity nudge on the already-shipped bay. STILL OWED — JOHN'S RULING (unchanged): DFW02 empty-model row @c1:001:38; heights for gpu-b40-02/cpu-gp2-*/inf-med-01/om2216-c14/fs-media-converter-chassis/VAST DBox/net-ufm-05; whether .252 magenta reads too loud; the FLAT-elevation EDP-vocabulary colour bug (own ship).
